Description.Name: Founding
Description.Details: You were in the thickest of fighting during the combined Operation Birddog and Bulldog to forcably eject Clan Smoke Jaguar from the Inner Sphere as part of the Hell-Wolves independant mercenary company. The war was over and the Hell Wolves disbanded to form several new companies including Pafftek Industries. You however decided to be your own Mercenary company. Taking the knowledge of mobility and armor to your future fights. Free Mech SOON(tm)
Description.Icon: UrbanLegend made VF477 Hell Wolves Icon

OptionDescription: You survived operation Birddog and Bulldog with the fame and reputation that gained you.
BioDescription: As part of your work with the now mostly defunct HELL WOLVES you are better prepaired for the future.
